extortion.description: [AI generated] TWTDIST.COM, or Turntable Training Wax, is a company primarily focused on serving DJs. They offer a wide variety of DJ-related products and accessories including vinyl records, slipmats, cartridge cases, controllers and more. They also have a special emphasis on DJ education, providing comprehensive training programs for beginners and experienced DJs. It is a one-stop-shop for all DJ essentials from hardware to conducted trainings. Based in the UK, they cater to customers worldwide.
